dependent_vars.definition: task + kernel-covered-slice accuracy (full metric vector V, F0 accounting)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: total-system peak ledger per F0 §3.4 (V component)
dependent_vars.name: memory

dependent_vars.definition: FLOPs/query, p50/p95 latency, usd/query per F0 §3.3 — verifier NN-cleanup |lexicon|·D MACs on the ledger (V component)
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

endpoints.test: vector arm reaches full-text accuracy at <=1/2 prompt FLOPs and KV bytes at d>=16; paired bootstrap α=0.05; ratio-bound NULL per P8 §1.5 row 3

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: P1 §4b row HE3 (verbatim): Measured range: 135M–1.7B. Envelope: ≤1.7B firm; to 7B direction-only with the pre-registered expectation of shrinkage; NO extrapolation of a win beyond 7B under any fit. Anchor: Law 2 + xRAG fidelity ceiling + LCM/CALM scaling penalty: every anchor predicts the dense-input win decays with host scale.
kill_criterion_verbatim: P1 §3 HE3 kill criterion (verbatim): 'Dead at a rung if the vector arm fails to beat BOTH matched-budget text arms at d≥16, or if the trained compressor matches it (then dense injection works but canonical training-free adds nothing to efficiency — residual claim moves to governance), or if amortized adapter cost exceeds per-query savings at Q=10⁶.' M2-output rider (pre-declared expected-fail): kill expected per LCM/SONAR-LLM; a surprise survival re-opens at the next rung only. HS10 (verbatim): 'If F3's vector arm is dominated by F2's cascade at matched accuracy, dense I/O is dropped from the efficiency track (latency-only survival must be measured, not presumed).'

corpus_hashes._recipe: sha256 over the sorted concatenation of '<relpath>:<file-sha256>\n' lines for every file under data/<corpus>/

runner_constraints.note: post-F2 infrastructure decision deferred by the maintainer at GNG-0; these pins are set by ops amendment or at this record's own freeze

title: F3 — dense concept input cuts prompt FLOPs/KV at matched accuracy (HE3; HS10 interface-vs-dense fork read with F2; 7 arms incl. matched-token text x2, xRAG-style compressor, shuffled kernel; M2-output expected-fail rider)
